executiveSummary: The scanner detected an issue related to Deprecated Protocol Enabled: TLS1. This represents a security risk on the target asset.
riskExplanation: The exposure of this module (tls) allows external clients to gather detail, potentially assisting in targeted reconnaissance. The server still accepts TLS1 connections, which has known security vulnerabilities (RFC 8996).
businessImpact: Allowing legacy properties to persist increases vulnerability rates, potentially leading to compliance failures under modern regulations like PCI-DSS.
attackScenarios: An attacker retrieves the disclosures from tls to identify misconfigured interfaces and executes tailored exploit scripts.
nextSteps: Disable TLS1 in your web server / load balancer TLS configuration
